summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Quick UI Wins and Medium Complexity features. All new features working correctly: password visibility toggle, dashboard logo navigation, newsletter subscription, payment logos, beta signup cards, Terms/Privacy/Help pages. All 3 new backend APIs tested and working.
seed_data_creation: Test user created: dashboard_test_user@example.com, newsletter subscriber: playwright_test@example.com, beta signup: playwright_beta_test@example.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Quick UI Wins and Medium Complexity features from Pre-launch checklist are working. Dashboard now shows all 5 AI apps (previous issue fixed). New pages /terms, /privacy, /help all render correctly with proper content.
tests_passed: Password visibility toggle (eye icon) - toggles between password/text input type
Dashboard sidebar logo click - navigates to landing page and logs out user
Newsletter subscription form - email input and subscribe button work, shows success message
Payment method logos (M-Pesa, Visa, Mastercard) visible on homepage
Beta signup cards on Apps page for EPK and Lead Gen apps with Email/WhatsApp/SMS channel options
Terms of Service page at /terms with full legal content (9 sections)
Privacy Policy page at /privacy with full privacy content (11 sections)
Help Center page at /help with search, 8 categories, and popular articles
API: POST /api/beta/signup - returns success and adds to waitlist
API: GET /api/beta/status/{app_id} - returns signup status correctly
Terms checkbox on registration form - submit button disabled until checked
Dashboard shows all 5 AI apps in sidebar (brandkit, musicbio, social, syncpitch, bizpitch)

design_review.newsletter_section: Clean design with email icon, input field, and purple subscribe button. Shows subscriber count.
design_review.payment_logos: M-PESA, VISA, Mastercard logos displayed in muted style matching color palette
design_review.beta_cards: Coming Soon badge, channel selection buttons (Email/WhatsApp/SMS), success state with checkmark
design_review.legal_pages: Clean typography, proper heading hierarchy, good readability on dark background
design_review.help_center: 8 category cards with icons, search bar, popular articles list, contact CTA
